b = java.getElements("class.info-chapters.0@a")

            c.push(b[i])
        }
c.reverse()
d = ""

            var link = c[i]
            d += link.outerHtml()
        }
result += a.html(d)
</js>

<js>
var txt = java.getString("#pagestats@text");
var max = 0;
var m = txt.match(/\/(\d+)/);
if (m) max = parseInt(m[1]);
var idMatch = baseUrl.match(/index\/(\d+)/);
var id = idMatch ? idMatch[1] : "";
var list = [];
if (id && max > 1) {
    for (var i = 2; i <= max; i++) {
        list.push("https://www.deqixs.co/index/" + id + "/" + i);
    }
}
list;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
let [, aid, cid] = baseUrl.match(/\/books\/(\d+)\/(\d+)\.html/);
let url = `https://www.deqixs.co/scripts/chapter.js.php?aid=${aid}&cid=${cid}&referrer=${baseUrl}`;
let tokenHtml = java.ajax(url);
eval(String(tokenHtml));

let params = {
  aid,
  cid,
  token: chapterToken,
  timestamp,
  nonce
};
let paramStr =	Object.entries(params)
    .map(x=>x.join("=")).join("&");
let headers = {
	 "Referer": baseUrl,
	 "Accept":	"text/plain, */*; q=0.01",
  "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest"
}
url = "https://www.deqixs.co/modules/article/ajax2.php?"+paramStr+","+JSON.stringify({
	 headers
})

java.ajax(url)
</js>
$..content||$.message

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
if (result.match(/阅读云/)) {
   u = baseUrl.split(',')[0]
   cookie.removeCookie(u)
   // java.startBrowserAwait(u, "验证")
   java.webView(null, u, "document.cookie")
   ck = cookie.getCookie(u)
   head = JSON.stringify({ headers: { 'Cookie': ck } })
   url = u + "," + head
   result = java.ajax(url)
}
result
</js>

.cat@a@text##正文卷.|正文.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|卷_|VIP章节.|免费章节.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字].*?[】）\)]
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

ruleContent.content:
<js>
page=result.match(/var c\=\"(.*?)\"/)?.[1]
//java.log(page)
function decrypt(encryptedString) {
    let encryptedData_ = String(java.base64Decode(encryptedString));
    let controlNum = parseInt(encryptedData_.slice(8, 11));
    //java.log(controlNum)
    let text = encryptedData_.slice(controlNum + 11, encryptedData_.length - controlNum);
     let encryptedData = text.replace(/_/g,"8L3A+").replace(/-/g, "PHA+");
     return java.base64Decode(encryptedData);
}
result1=decrypt(page)
result2=java.getString('#chaptercontent@p@html')
result=result2 + result1
</js>

ruleSearch.name: $.book_name
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
pi=src.match(/search_book_str']="(.+)"/)[1];
//java.log(pi)
var je=java.base64Decode(pi,"utf-8")
var st=decodeURIComponent(je)
//java.log(st)
result=st;
result;
</js>
$.book_list.*

ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

ruleBookInfo.name: [property$=book_name]@content
ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
{{@@[property$=chapter_name]@content}}
@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求含理更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

<js>
//用于自动生成发现规则
b=false;
if(b){
let api="/app/lib/listv2?packageId=ihuaben&page=\{\{page\}\}&pageSize=20&sortType=clickcount_days_7&tagId=0&tokenId=NTAyNDUwNTA6MTYyNjcyMzYyMzpjMGU3ODlhNzQ3OTZmYmIy&keyword=";
let words=['都市言情','古代言情','玄幻言情','校园言情','穿越言情','灵异言情','短篇','二次元','灵异','都市','玄幻奇幻','历史军事','武侠仙侠','游戏竞技','科幻末世','明星同人','动漫同人','游戏同人','影视同人','小说同人'];
var s=[];
words.map(o=>{
var i={"title":o,"url":api+o}
s.push(i);
})
java.log(JSON.stringify(s))
}
java.getString("$.wordcount")
</js>

ruleContent.replaceRegex: ##\{\{book.durChapterTitle\}\}|\(\本章完\)|PS：.*求推荐！|PS：.*求收藏！|\.*第.*章.*|感谢.*打赏.*|感谢.*推荐票.*|感谢.*月票.*|（.*月票.*）|（为大家的.*票加更.*）|第二更在.*|\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}|喜欢{{book.name}}.*收藏.*| ===
ruleContent.content:
<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString("#chaptercontent@html");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

var sb='';

i++
}

}

}

searchUrl:
<js>
/*调试->右上角的小虫子，随便搜一个词*/
/*Token写了东西的话要删掉才能进行下面步骤：
①填上电话号码点调试会获取验证码；
②填上验证码点调试会获取token；
③把token填在Token【目录的章节url那也有个token记得也要填，不填的话从发现点的书是没有登录的】；
④把电话号码跟验证码的值删了【❗️填了电话号码会一搜索就发验证码】，保存书源*/
/*如登录过期需要重新登录，请删除以前填写的token再调试获取验证码，重复前面的步骤*/

电话号码="";

验证码="";

Token="34304776fc02d974a641eef13b603e20";

//下面不要动
var time = Math.round(new Date()/1000);
token=java.put('token',Token);
function sign(list){
var sb='';
sb+="Fb0gqLMSf5Android";
list=list.sort();
i=0;
while(i<list.length){
if(i==0){
sb+=list[i]
}else{
    if(list[i].match(/lang-app=/)){  
      i2=i+1;
     i3=i2+1;
     if (list[i2] != null && list[i2].match(/lang=/)) {
                        sb+="&";
                        sb+=list[i2];
                        
                        sb+="&";
                        sb+=list[i];
                        
                        i = i3;
                    }
           }
                sb+="&";
                sb+=list[i];             
      }
i++
}
sb+="AEdDtho2CjiH901aVK7swFqclu6NmzJ4";
return String(java.md5Encode(sb)).toUpperCase()
}



//获取验证码开始
num=电话号码;
y=验证码;
if(num.match(/^\d{11}$/) && !y  && !Token){
list2=[
 "mobile=86"+num,
"appId=",
"osType=2",
"product=1",
"sysVer=10",
"time="+time,
"token="+token,
"ver=2.1.3",
"packageName=com.lestory.jihua.an",
"lang-app=zh-Hans",
"lang=zh-hans",
"locale=CN"
]
s=sign(list2);
json2={ "mobile": "86"+String(num),"product":"1","ver":"2.1.3","sign":s,"sysVer":"10","locale":"CN","token":String(token),"lang-app":"zh-Hans","appId":"","osType":"2","time":time,"packageName":"com.lestory.jihua.an","lang":"zh-hans"}

option1={
"method": "POST",
"body": JSON.stringify(json2)
}
url='http://api.lestory.cn/message/send,'+JSON.stringify(option1);
java.log(JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).msg=="success"?"验证码发送成功，请注意短信":"验证码获取失败，请稍候再试");
}else if(y && !Token){
list2=[
 "mobile=86"+num,
"code="+y,
"appId=",
"osType=2",
"product=1",
"sysVer=10",
"time="+time,
"token="+token,
"ver=2.1.3",
"packageName=com.lestory.jihua.an",
"lang-app=zh-Hans",
"lang=zh-hans",
"locale=CN"
]
s=sign(list2);
json2={ "code":String(y),"mobile": "86"+String(num),"product":"1","ver":"2.1.3","sign":s,"sysVer":"10","locale":"CN","token":String(token),"lang-app":"zh-Hans","appId":"","osType":"2","time":time,"packageName":"com.lestory.jihua.an","lang":"zh-hans"}

option1={
"method": "POST",
"body": JSON.stringify(json2)
}
url='http://api.lestory.cn/user/mobile-login,'+JSON.stringify(option1);
a=JSON.parse(java.ajax(url));
java.log(a.msg=="success"?'❗️下面是你的Token，请复制❗️\n'+a.data.user_token:JSON.stringify(a));
}
//获取验证码结束

"page_num="+page,
"keyword="+key,
"lang=zh-hans",
"lang-app=zh-Hans",
"locale=CN",
"osType=2",
"packageName=com.lestory.jihua.an",
"time="+time,
"ver=2.1.3",
"product=1",
"token=",

];


java.put('token',Token);
s1=sign(list);

json={"sign":String(s1),"packageName":"com.lestory.jihua.an","time":time,"token":"","locale":"CN","page_num":page,"osType":"2","keyword":key,"lang":"zh-hans","lang-app":"zh-Hans","ver":"2.1.3","product":1,"sysVer":"10"}

option={

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

if(result.match(/replace/)){
s=result.match(/replace.*?\{(.*?)\}/)[1].replace(/\\/g,'\\\\')
num=s.split(',').length
for(var i=0;i<num;i++){
	m=s.match(/"(.*?)":"(.*?)"/)
	s=s.replace(/.*?,/,'')
	result=result.replace(new RegExp(m[2],'g'),m[1])
	}

result

ruleContent.content:
<js>
let txt = "";
let regex = /PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g;
let match;

while ((match = regex.exec(result)) !== null) {
    let base64 = match[0].replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9\+\/\=]/g, "");
    txt += java.base64Decode(base64) + "\n";
}

if (txt.trim() === "") {
    let html = java.webView(null, baseUrl, null);
    txt = java.getString(".word_read@p!-1@html", html)
}

txt;
</js>

exploreUrl: (() => { // 1. 获取网页源码 let html = java.ajax("https://bbxxxx.com/"); let list = [ { "title": "最新", "url": "https://bbxxxx.com/rank/new/", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } }, { "title": "热门", "url": "https://bbxxxx.com/rank/hot/", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } }, { "title": "完本", "url": "https://bbxxxx.com/rank/complete/", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.25 } } ]; // --- 提取分类 (Category) --- list.push({ "title": "分类", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } }) // 匹配格式如: 调教 let reg1 = /(.*?)<\/a>/g; let match1; while ((match1 = reg1.exec(html)) !== null) { list.push({ "title": match1[2], "url": match1[1] + ",{\"webView\":true}", // 如果需要翻页，可以在此基础上修改 "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 } }); } // --- 提取标签 (Tag) --- list.push({ "title": "标签", "url": "", "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1 } }); // 匹配格式如: 调教 let reg = /(.*?)<\/a>/g; let match; while ((match = reg.exec(html)) !== null) { list.push({ "title": match[2], "url": match[1] + ",{\"webView\":true}", // 如果需要翻页，可以在此基础上修改 "style": { "layout_flexGrow": 1, "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.2 } }); } return JSON.stringify(list); })()

<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
//java.log(String(bes))
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    var txt = java.getString(".word_read@p@text",ml);
    java.toast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var arr = baseUrl.split('/');
var songtype = arr[3];
var songid = arr[4].split('.')[0];
/*
var data = java.ajax("http://service.5sing.kugou.com/song/getSongUrl?version=6.6.70&songid=" + songid + "&songtype=" + songtype);
data = JSON.parse(data).data
data.squrl || data.hqurl || data.lqurl;
*/
	
let params = {
  appid: 3146,
  clienttime: Math.ceil(Date.now() / 1000),
  clientver: 610850,
  dfid: "-",
  from: "com.sing.client.player",
  mid: 114514,
  songfields: "ID,SN,SK,SW,SS,ST,SI,CT,M,S,ZQ,WO,ZC,HY,YG,CK,D,RQ,DD,E,R,RC,SG,C,CS,LV,LG,SY,UID,PT,SCSR,SC,KM5",
  songid: songid,
  songtype: songtype,
  token: "",
  userfields: "ID,NN,I,YCRQ,FCRQ",
  uuid: "-"
}

let signstr = ""
let keys = Object.keys(params).sort()
for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
  signstr += `${keys[i]}=${params[keys[i]]}`
}
let signature = java.md5Encode("UqgPMZpjgRZQ7s8JAuUIP5DQdo5O5NB" + signstr + "UqgPMZpjgRZQ7s8JAuUIP5DQdo5O5NB")

let querys = []
for (let i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
  querys.push(`${keys[i]}=${params[keys[i]]}`.replace(/\,/g, "%2c"))
}
let querystr = querys.join("&") + "&signature=" + signature
let request = java.ajax("https://5sapi.kugou.com/song/getSongUrl?" + querystr)
// java.log(request)
let data = JSON.parse(request).data
data.squrl || data.squrl_backup || data.hqurl || data.hqurl_backup || data.lqurl || data.lqurl_backup
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
    let list=[],
    push=(text,href,vol)=>list.push({
        "text": text,
        "href": href,
        "vol": vol
    });
    let c=result.match(/\[\{"id"[\s\S]*?\]/g),
    v=java.getElements('[class^="text-lg"]>div');
    for (i=0;i<c.length;i++){
    	    push(v[c.length-(i+1)].text(),'',true);
    	    let j=JSON.parse(c[c.length-(i+1)]);
    	    j.reverse().forEach(n=>{
    	        push(n.title,'/cn/chapters/'+n.id,false);
    	    });
    	};
    	list;
</js>
